excluded_categories.reason: No authentication, authorization, or role-based access is mentioned in the requirement.
No UI behavior, messages, loading states, or empty states are specified in the requirement.
No dependencies (e.g., external services, APIs) are explicitly identified.
No network-related requirements or dependencies are mentioned.
No localization or internationalization requirements are specified.

scenario_generation_rules: Generate positive test cases for successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length.
Generate negative test cases for account creation with duplicate email (violating BR001).
Generate negative test cases for account creation with password less than 8 characters (violating BR002).
Generate validation test cases to verify email uniqueness check before account creation (VAL001).
Generate validation test cases to verify password length validation (VAL002).
Generate boundary test cases for password length: exactly 8 characters, 7 characters, and 9 characters.
Generate security test cases for concurrent registration attempts with the same email (based on RISK001).

Do not generate test cases for password complexity beyond minimum length, email format, error messages, password storage, character restrictions, max lengths, case sensitivity, or rate limiting, as these are missing information and not explicitly stated in the requirement.
